creator: cse.cem@gmail.com
text: I'm ok with kcheckpass as a solution, but it must be installable without pulling in all of KDE. I think that's doable. I should make a kcheckpass port; change kde4-workspace plist to exclude kcheckpass and have the port require it as a run-time dep; and finally fix enlightenment to use kcheckpass on FreeBSD.
